mapper.select: SELECT h.*,MIN(r.price) as minPrice, MAX(r.maxOccupancy) as hotelMaxOccupancy FROM hotel h INNER JOIN room r ON h.h_code = r.h_code GROUP BY h.h_code

SELECT h.h_code,h.hotelName,h.country,h.city,h.type,h.h_address,h.discount,MIN(r.price) as 'minPrice' FROM hotel h INNER JOIN room r ON h.h_code = r.h_code WHERE h.city = #{hotelcity} and h.h_code != #{hotelcode} GROUP BY h.h_code
SELECT h.h_code as 'r_h_code', avg(rb.rb_score) as 'h_rating' FROM reviewboard rb INNER JOIN room r ON rb.r_code = r.r_code INNER JOIN hotel h ON h.h_code = r.h_code group by h.h_code
SELECT h.h_code, MIN(r.price) as hotelPrice FROM hotel h INNER JOIN room r ON h.h_code = r.h_code GROUP BY h.h_code

SELECT h.*,MIN(r.price) as hotelPrice,IFNULL(avg(rb.rb_score),0.0) as hotelAvgScore, MAX(maxOccupancy) as hotelMaxOccupancy FROM hotel h INNER JOIN room r on h.h_code = r.h_code LEFT JOIN reviewboard rb on rb.r_code = r.r_code group by h.h_code
SELECT *FROM hotel ORDER BY h_code DESC LIMIT #{startRow}, #{pageSize}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hotel
hotelName LIKE CONCAT("%",#{searchKeyword},"%")
country LIKE CONCAT("%",#{searchKeyword},"%")
city LIKE CONCAT("%",#{searchKeyword},"%")
type LIKE CONCAT("%",#{searchKeyword},"%")

SELECT * FROM hotel
hotelName LIKE CONCAT("%",#{searchKeyword},"%")
country LIKE CONCAT("%",#{searchKeyword},"%")
city LIKE CONCAT("%",#{searchKeyword},"%")
type LIKE CONCAT("%",#{searchKeyword},"%")
ORDER BY h_code DESC LIMIT #{startRow}, #{pageSize}
mapper.update: UPDATE hotel SET hotelName =#{hotelName},country =#{country},city =#{city},type =#{type},h_address =#{h_address},discount =#{discount},startDate =#{startDate}, endDate =#{endDate},roomservice =#{roomservice},publicservice =#{publicservice},otherservice =#{otherservice} WHERE h_code =#{h_code}
